channel.title: LLM Timeline — Kyutai Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Kyutai.

item.title: Helium-1 (Kyutai)
item.description: Parameters: Helium-1 License: open Type: model "Helium-1 preview, an initial version of our new backbone language model with 2B parameters, targeting edge and mobile devices... We use token level distillation of a 7B parameters model to train Helium-1 preview."

item.title: Helium 7B (Kyutai)
item.description: Parameters: Helium 7B License: open Type: model "1. The model is fine-tuned on 100K transcripts generated by Helium itself. 2. These transcripts are highly detailed, heavily annotated with emotion and style, and conversational. 3. Text to Speech Engine is further fine-tuned on 20 hours of audio recorded by Alice and licensed."
